title: Typed tool library + SOP execution (the missing spine)

phases.title: Tool registry skeleton + schema export
tasks: hex-nexus/src/tools/mod.rs — Tool trait, ToolRegistry struct
hex-nexus/src/tools/schema.rs — Anthropic function-calling JSON schema generator
Tool execute path: takes JSON args, returns JSON result + status
Registry singleton initialized at boot

phases.title: First 4 tool primitives
tasks: tools/cargo_check.rs — wrap `cargo check --workspace --message-format=json`
tools/repo_grep.rs — wrap ripgrep with timeout + size cap
tools/adr_draft.rs — emit proposed_action(kind=file_write) for docs/adrs/<id>-<slug>.md
tools/escalate_to_operator.rs — insert inbox_notification row priority=2

phases.title: Inference function-calling wiring
tasks: Extend inference/complete request to pass `tools` array (Anthropic schema)
Parse `tool_use` blocks from response
Tool-call execution loop: call tool → feed result back to model as tool_result → continue until model emits non-tool reply
Cap tool call depth at 8 to bound runaway loops

phases.title: SOP executor in org_responder
tasks: orchestration/sop_executor.rs — phase state machine
Phase CLASSIFY: regex-based intent detection (adr_draft|arch_review|code_question|bug_triage|roadmap|paradigm_question)
Phase GROUND: parallel tool calls (repo_grep + adr_search if available)
Phase REASON: single inference with tool registry attached, parses structured action from tool_use
Phase VERIFY: per-action-kind validator (adr_schema_validate today)
Phase EMIT: write proposed_action + structured chat card
Feature flag HEX_SOP_PERSONAS (CSV); cto-only at first

phases.title: End-to-end demo
tasks: Build + deploy nexus
Send: '@cto draft an ADR for the typed tool library'
Verify: phase trace logged, ADR file exists with on-topic content (not enterprise CI/CD LARP)
Verify: cargo_check called as a tool during reasoning
Verify: chat card rendered (not free prose)

phases.title: Memory + commit
tasks: feedback_typed_tool_pivot.md — what we learned tonight
project_sop_executor_live.md — operational notes for follow-on
Commit + tag work as wp-typed-tool-library/morning-1
